nodes.label: Caleb
nodes.description: One of the three sons of Hezron of the tribe of Judah. He is also called Chelubai (1 Chr. 2:9). His descendants are enumerated (18-20, 42-49).

nodes.label: Ardon
nodes.description: Descendant, the last of the three sons of Caleb by his first wife Azubah (1 Chr. 2:18).

nodes.label: Jahdai
nodes.description: Grasper, a descendant of Caleb, of the family of Hezron (1 Chr. 2:47).

nodes.label: Jesher
nodes.description: Uprightness, the first of the three sons of Caleb by Azubah (1 Chr. 2:18).

nodes.label: Haran (son of Caleb)
nodes.description: The son of Caleb of Judah (1 Chr. 2:46) by his concubine Ephah.

nodes.label: Mesha
nodes.description: Heb. meysh’a, “deliverance,” the eldest son of Caleb (1 Chr. 2:42), and brother of Jerahmeel.

nodes.label: Moza
nodes.description: One of the sons of Caleb (1 Chr. 2:46).

nodes.label: Shobab
nodes.description: One of the sons of Caleb (1 Chr. 2:18), the son of Hezron.

verses.text: And Ephah, Caleb’s concubine, bare Haran, and Moza, and Gazez: and Haran begat Gazez.
